channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 01lab : le Galaxy S26 Ultra surpasse-t-il son prédécesseur en terme d’autonomie ?
item.description: Avant la publication du test complet du Galaxy S26 Ultra, le nouveau haut de gamme de Samsung est passé par le 01Lab. En ligne de mire, l’autonomie avec notre nouveau protocole. Résultats ? On vous laisse découvrir.

item.title: J’ai remplacé mon iPhone 11 Pro Max par l’iPhone 17 Pro : voici ce qui a vraiment changé
item.description: Après six ans passés avec mon iPhone 11 Pro Max, j’ai décidé de le remplacer par l’iPhone 17 Pro. Un changement radical sur le papier, plus nuancé à l’usage. Design, performances, ergonomie : voici mon ressenti après un saut de six générations chez Apple.

item.title: How Each Gulf Country Is Intercepting Iranian Missiles and Drones
item.description: As missiles and drones cross the region’s skies, the Gulf’s layered air-defense networks—from THAAD to Patriot batteries—are being tested in real time.

item.title: 6 cheap accessories to make your Apple Watch more useful
item.description: Your Apple Watch is great, but these accessories make it better

item.title: I enjoyed testing this accomplished active stereo speaker system, until it threw in the towel too easily
item.description: The KEF Coda W has plenty to recommend it but the active pair of stereo speakers has involved the brand in an arms race with itself…

item.title: Here are my 5 most anticipated 4K Blu-rays of March 2026
item.description: There are plenty of new and exciting 4K Blu-rays coming in March 2026, but I've picked my personal top 5 I can't wait to test.

item.title: I spent two weeks testing Amazon’s new Echo Studio, and I love the stylish new design — but I’m not sure it’s worth the audio-quality trade-offs
item.description: Amazon’s new, second-generation Echo Studio is powerful yet petite, offering a full retinue of home theatre features and Alexa+ compatibility – but was the trade-off for a smaller form factor worth it?

item.title: ICYMI: the week's 9 biggest tech news stories from Apple's MacBook Neo to launch to Xbox's new console tease
item.description: This week we went to MWC and were treated to some major Nothing and Apple launches including the Apple MacBook Neo.

item.title: How to watch Top Chef season 23 online from anywhere
item.description: New season brings Southern flavors, fierce rivalries, and high stakes. Here’s how you can watch Top Chef season 23 online and from anywhere.

item.title: App fatigue is real. I tested the best dating apps of 2026 to find the ones that really work.
item.description: To find the best dating apps, I tested Hinge, Tinder, Match, and more. Find the right app for serious relationships, casual hookups, and free matches.

item.title: Site to check womens body counts goes viral — and some men are defending it
item.description: A viral site claiming to calculate a woman's "body count" using AI is actually just a random number generator.

item.title: How to watch Wrexham vs. Chelsea in the FA Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch FA Cup for free. Live stream Wrexham vs. Chelsea in the FA Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Avant même sa sortie, le Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Pro est déjà moins cher chez Boulanger
item.description: Pour s'offrir le Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Pro à prix réduit, cela se passe chez Boulanger. Avec un bonus reprise de 150 euros, le laptop tombe à 1 849,99 euros.

item.title: Scotland vs France Free Streams: How to watch Six Nations 2026 game, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Scotland vs France live streams online – including for FREE – in the 2026 Six Nations round 4 clash at Murrayfield.

item.title: L’Oppo Find N6 fuite : le smartphone pliable hériterait d’un coloris qui rappelle celui de l’iPhone 17 Pro Max
item.description: Une fuite partagée par le leaker evleaks dévoile des visuels du futur Oppo Find N6, un smartphone pliable dont le design et certaines caractéristiques techniques commencent à se préciser.

item.title: ChatGPT : le « mode adulte » promis par OpenAI est finalement reporté
item.description: Si vous espériez frétiller à la lecture des mots coquins de ChatGPT, il va falloir repasser. Le « mode adulte » annoncé par Sam Altman en octobre dernier n'est toujours pas disponible. Pire : il a été reporté à des jours meilleurs.

item.title: How to Avoid Getting Locked Out of Your Google Account
item.description: Make a recovery plan now to avoid losing access to your account in the future.

item.title: Finding stability in an age of relentless AI innovation
item.description: The challenge is not just implementing AI but keeping pace with the relentless changes required.

item.title: Can’t read books anymore? Neuroscience has a 5-step plan to get your focus back
item.description: Many of us struggle to focus enough to read a whole book. Neuroscience says that’s terrible news for our brains but offers a fix. Have you found that you now struggle to get through a book? If so, I have good and bad news for you. The bad news is that losing your ability to read books may be common at the moment, but neuroscience says it is a very bad sign for how our brains are doing. The better news is that science also offers a simple plan to recover your ability to read deeply again. ...

item.title: The MacBook Neo establishes Apple as an affordable tech brand
item.description: It’s a new era for Apple, one that actually started 20 years ago. If I had a nickel for every time over the past two decades that I’ve heard someone say, “Apple is many things, but affordable isn’t one of them,” I’d probably have enough to buy the latest 16-inch M5 MacBook Pro, introduced this week at an eye-watering $2,699. And if I had another nickel for every time someone shot back, “What do you expect? Apple is a luxury brand—like Ferrari, after all,” I could probably pick up the $3,299 Studio Display XDR the company unveiled this week, too....

item.title: I wore JLabs ridiculously big headphone speakers. I still have so many questions!
item.description: The JLab Blue XL giant headphone-style speakers had me asking... what the hell did I just test?

item.title: Pokémon TCG: First Partner Illustration Collection Series 1 preorders are live at Amazon — buy now for under $70
item.description: Pokémon TCG First Partner Illustration Collection preorders are live at Amazon. Buy now for under $70 at Amazon

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone has hit its best-ever price at Amazon — save $500 this weekend
item.description: This DJI Mini 5 Pro drone camera is on sale this weekend for $1,099. That's the record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is under market price at Amazon — score the best preorder deal
item.description: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is available to pre-order for under $50 at Amazon.

item.title: Bridgerton author Julia Quinn on Benophie, gender flipping, and the yearnaissance
item.description: Mashable sat down with 'Bridgerton' author Julia Quinn to talk Regency romance, the Netflix series, and throwing men into bodies of water.

item.title: The great Grindr glossary: all terms and acronyms explained
item.description: What do the Grindr terms gh, gen, side, wya, ff, pnp, cd, npnc, poz, ws, dl, and into mean?

item.title: Data is scarily prescient about AI and immigration. Its team is ready to meet the moment.
item.description: Playwright Matthew Libby and star Karan Brar discuss how "Data" has grown more relevant day by day.

item.title: Despite tech shortages, get a MacBook Pro on sale for under $450
item.description: Get a MacBook Pro on sale for $429.97

item.title: One platform gives you lifetime access to Gemini, ChatGPT, Anthropic, and more for $70
item.description: 1min.AI gives you lifetime access to GPT, Gemini, and more for $70

item.title: It costs less to get a Microsoft Office 2024 lifetime license than to pay one year of Microsoft 365
item.description: Microsoft Office 2024 comes Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and more, minus the monthly fee

item.title: AdultFriendFinder vs. Plenty of Fish: Most legit, success rates, and more
item.description: AdultFriendFinder and Plenty of Fish continue to stay relevant, attracting millions of visitors from all over the world searching for connection.

item.title: How to watch India vs. New Zealand in the 2026 T20 World Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch T20 World Cup for free. Live stream India vs. New Zealand in the 2026 T20 World Cup final for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Orange développe son OS pour Livebox : voici prplOS et son store d’apps
item.description: Orange s'apprête enfin à transformer nos box en mini-ordinateurs avec le Livebox Store, une boutique d'applications qui pourrait changer votre quotidien.
